name: getCollection
description:
Get information about a collection. By default this tool returns the lightweight collection map (metadata + recursive itemRefs).
Use the model parameter to opt in to Postman's full API responses:
- model=minimal — root-level folder/request IDs only
- model=full — full Postman collection payload.

collectionId.description: The collection ID must be in the form <OWNER_ID>-<UUID> (e.g. 12345-33823532ab9e41c9b6fd12d0fd459b8b).

access_key.description: A collection's read-only access key. Using this query parameter does not require an API key to call the endpoint.

model.description: Optional response shape override. Omit to receive the lightweight collection map. Set to `minimal` for the Postman minimal model or `full` for the complete collection payload.
